Variables.Name: ServerPvdThresholdMs
Variables.Description: Default ServerPvdThresholdMs.

Variables.Name: ClientPvdThresholdMs
Variables.Description: Default ClientPvdThresholdMs.

Variables.Name: ServerPvdRecordTimeSeconds
Variables.Description: Default ServerPvdRecordTimeSeconds.

Variables.Name: ClientPvdRecordTimeSeconds
Variables.Description: Default ClientPvdRecordTimeSeconds.

Variables.Name: DefaultGravityZ
Variables.Description: Default gravity.

Variables.Name: DefaultTerminalVelocity
Variables.Description: Default terminal velocity for Physics Volumes.

Variables.Name: DefaultFluidFriction
Variables.Description: Default fluid friction for Physics Volumes.

Variables.Name: SimulateScratchMemorySize
Variables.Description: Amount of memory to reserve for PhysX simulate(), this is per pxscene and will be rounded up to the next 16K boundary

Variables.Name: RagdollAggregateThreshold
Variables.Description: Threshold for ragdoll bodies above which they will be added to an aggregate before being added to the scene

Variables.Name: TriangleMeshTriangleMinAreaThreshold
Variables.Description: Triangles from triangle meshes (BSP) with an area less than or equal to this value will be removed from physics collision data. Set to less than 0 to disable.

Variables.Name: bEnableAsyncScene
Variables.Description: Enables the use of an async scene

Variables.Name: bEnableShapeSharing
Variables.Description: Enables shape sharing between sync and async scene for static rigid actors

Variables.Name: bEnablePCM
Variables.Description: Enables persistent contact manifolds. This will generate fewer contact points, but with more accuracy. Reduces stability of stacking, but can help energy conservation.

Variables.Name: bEnableStabilization
Variables.Description: Enables stabilization of contacts for slow moving bodies. This will help improve the stability of stacking.

Variables.Name: bWarnMissingLocks
Variables.Description: Whether to warn when physics locks are used incorrectly. Turning this off is not recommended and should only be used by very advanced users.

Variables.Name: bEnable2DPhysics
Variables.Description: Can 2D physics be used (Box2D)?

Variables.Name: PhysicErrorCorrection
Variables.Description: Error correction data for replicating simulated physics (rigid bodies)

Variables.Name: DefaultDegreesOfFreedom
Variables.Description: Useful for constraining all objects in the world, for example if you are making a 2D game using 3D environments.

Variables.Name: BounceThresholdVelocity
Variables.Description: Minimum relative velocity required for an object to bounce. A typical value for simulation stability is about 0.2  gravity

Variables.Name: FrictionCombineMode
Variables.Description: Friction combine mode, controls how friction is computed for multiple materials.

Variables.Name: RestitutionCombineMode
Variables.Description: Restitution combine mode, controls how restitution is computed for multiple materials.

Variables.Name: MaxAngularVelocity
Variables.Description: Max angular velocity that a simulated object can achieve.

Variables.Name: MaxDepenetrationVelocity
Variables.Description: Max velocity which may be used to depenetrate simulated physics objects. 0 means no maximum.

Variables.Name: ContactOffsetMultiplier
Variables.Description: Contact offset multiplier. When creating a physics shape we look at its bounding volume and multiply its minimum value by this multiplier. A bigger number will generate contact points earlier which results in higher stability at the cost of performance.

Variables.Name: MinContactOffset
Variables.Description: Min Contact offset.

Variables.Name: MaxContactOffset
Variables.Description: Max Contact offset.

Variables.Name: bSimulateSkeletalMeshOnDedicatedServer
Variables.Description:
If true, simulate physics for this component on a dedicated server.
	  This should be set if simulating physics and replicating with a dedicated server.

Variables.Name: DefaultShapeComplexity
Variables.Description: Determines the default physics shape complexity.

Variables.Name: bDefaultHasComplexCollision_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: If true, static meshes will use per poly collision as complex collision by default. If false the default behavior is the same as UseSimpleAsComplex.

Variables.Name: bSuppressFaceRemapTable
Variables.Description: If true, the internal physx face to UE face mapping will not be generated. This is a memory optimization available if you do not rely on face indices returned by scene queries.

Variables.Name: bSupportUVFromHitResults
Variables.Description: If true, store extra information to allow FindCollisionUV to derive UV info from a line trace hit result, using the FindCollisionUV utility

Variables.Name: bDisableActiveActors
Variables.Description: If true, physx will not update unreal with any bodies that have moved during the simulation. This should only be used if you have no physx simulation or you are manually updating the unreal data via polling physx.

Variables.Name: bDisableCCD
Variables.Description: If true CCD will be ignored. This is an optimization when CCD is never used which removes the need for physx to check it internally.

Variables.Name: bEnableEnhancedDeterminism
Variables.Description: If set to true, the scene will use enhanced determinism at the cost of a bit more resources. See eENABLE_ENHANCED_DETERMINISM to learn about the specifics

Variables.Name: MaxPhysicsDeltaTime
Variables.Description: Max Physics Delta Time to be clamped.

Variables.Name: bSubstepping
Variables.Description: Whether to substep the physics simulation. This feature is still experimental. Certain functionality might not work correctly

Variables.Name: bSubsteppingAsync
Variables.Description: Whether to substep the async physics simulation. This feature is still experimental. Certain functionality might not work correctly

Variables.Name: MaxSubstepDeltaTime
Variables.Description: Max delta time (in seconds) for an individual simulation substep.

Variables.Name: MaxSubsteps
Variables.Description: Max number of substeps for physics simulation.

Variables.Name: ServerMaxSubstepDeltaTime
Variables.Description: pixelchen 服务器单独设置MaxSubstepDeltaTime

Variables.Name: ServerMaxSubsteps
Variables.Description: pixelchen 服务器单独设置MaxSubsteps

Variables.Name: SyncSceneSmoothingFactor
Variables.Description: Physics delta time smoothing factor for sync scene.

Variables.Name: AsyncSceneSmoothingFactor
Variables.Description: Physics delta time smoothing factor for async scene.

Variables.Name: InitialAverageFrameRate
Variables.Description: Physics delta time initial average.

Variables.Name: PhysXTreeRebuildRate
Variables.Description: The number of frames it takes to rebuild the PhysX scene query AABB tree. The bigger the number, the smaller fetchResults takes per frame, but the more the tree deteriorates until a new tree is built
